free_text: Elastic scattering of protons by beryllium.
Unsupported beryllium foils, 10-30 keV thick to 1-MeV
calibration using Rutherford scattering cross section
by comparison with 873- and 1372-keV resonances in
target were analyzed by a high-resolution
mounted to allow a continuously variable scattering
angle from 0 to 160 degrees with respect to the
incident beam direction. The resultant magnetically
analyzed particles were counted by means of a cesium
backed by a DuMont 6291 photo- multiplier, standard
SANs 3,4 split according to absolute and
SD: ref. on ND/A corrected. BIB updated.
Titles of digitizing errors changed according to
Dict. in Subents 003-006. SF9=EXP in REACTION code in
were added. Monitor, Detector and Error descriptions
published at pp. 250-254 of this article
